visual_description: In a dimly lit stone hall with tall arches and columns, a crowd of students in dark robes rushes down a wide staircase. A young woman with long red hair, wearing a dark dress, turns her head and shouts toward the crowd. A man in a dark suit and a man with glasses move through the throng nearby.
audio_description: Urgent shouts and a female voice call out names amid the chaotic crowd. The sound is loud and strained, indicating panic.
